goal: Implement current-page provider detection and native input insertion without auto-send.
non_goals: Do not implement automatic send as default behavior.
Do not implement full chat history capture.
Do not open other provider pages.
acceptance_criteria: A SiteAdapter interface exists with detect and insertText methods.
The UI shows current page provider and insertion readiness.
Clicking insert sends task text to the current page native input.
After insertion, UI prompts the user to manually send.
Insertion failure is visible with a user-readable Chinese error.
